title: selaginella viridissima
intro: Selaginella viridissima, also known as the 'Emerald Spikemoss', is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, typically found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and wounds. The health benefits of Selaginella viridissima include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella viridissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
